clinicalProfile.patientSummary: Nigerian patient referred by Lagos Family Physicians Group with symptomatic mitral valve disease.
clinicalProfile.caseSummary: Hospital-ready cardiac package is being prepared for Turkey hospitals after initial referral protection registration.
clinicalProfile.medicalProblem: Valvular heart disease with surgical evaluation required.
clinicalProfile.medicalHistory: Progressive cardiac symptoms with cardiology notes and echo report available.
clinicalProfile.medications: Beta blocker and diuretic; anticoagulation status needs confirmation.
clinicalProfile.functionalStatus: Symptomatic with exertion but outpatient stable.
clinicalProfile.travelFitness: Likely fit for commercial travel if cardiology clearance confirms stability.

preliminaryOpinion.aiDraftSummary: Available documents suggest clinically significant mitral valve disease requiring cardiothoracic review. Travel appears possible if current stability is confirmed.
keyFindings: Echo report supports mitral valve disease
preliminaryOpinion.possibleDiagnosis: Severe mitral valve disease requiring surgical evaluation.
suggestedQuestions: Has the patient had prior cardiac intervention?
Any history of stroke or clotting?
preliminaryOpinion.travelSuitability: Potentially suitable for commercial travel after cardiology clearance.
preliminaryOpinion.localTreatmentRecommendation: Continue local cardiology management while hospital opinions are pending.
preliminaryOpinion.emergencyRecommendation: If chest pain, fainting, or severe breathlessness occurs, seek urgent local care immediately.
preliminaryOpinion.clinicalLeadReview: Approved after medication clarification request added.
preliminaryOpinion.correctionNotes: Changed wording from diagnosis certainty to suspected severity based on available documents.
preliminaryOpinion.patientFacingOpinion: Based on the available reports, your case appears suitable for specialist cardiothoracic review abroad. We recommend collecting the remaining medication and cardiac test details while hospital teams review the package.
preliminaryOpinion.disclaimer: This preliminary medical opinion is based only on the available documents. It is not a final diagnosis or treatment decision and does not replace evaluation by the relevant specialist or hospital medical team.

hospitalPackage.medicalSummary: 42-year-old female from Nigeria with symptomatic mitral valve disease seeking surgical evaluation.
hospitalPackage.clinicalCaseSummary: Echo and cardiology notes available. Patient is clinically stable but requires cardiothoracic review for repair/replacement options.
hospitalPackage.caseBrief: Urgent cardiac surgery evaluation requested. Early hospital registration completed for commission protection.
clinicalQuestions: What additional pre-op tests are required?
hospitalPackage.requestedTreatmentPlan: Surgical plan with repair vs replacement recommendation
hospitalPackage.requestedEstimatedCost: Package estimate including ICU and inpatient stay
hospitalPackage.notesToHospital: Please confirm if angiography is required before travel.

timeline.notes: Cardiac case sent for clinical decision workflow.

auditTrail.reason: Clinical lead validated AI draft with corrections

clinicalProfile.patientSummary: Ghana oncology patient seeking second opinion and treatment planning.
clinicalProfile.caseSummary: Documents are insufficient for hospital package due to missing pathology and staging data.
clinicalProfile.medicalHistory: Cancer diagnosis documented; prior treatment details incomplete.
clinicalProfile.travelFitness: Cannot assess fully until staging and current labs are complete.

checklist.notes: Needed before preliminary opinion is sent.

preliminaryOpinion.aiDraftSummary: Available records suggest prostate cancer requiring staging confirmation before treatment planning. Pathology is the main missing document.
preliminaryOpinion.possibleDiagnosis: Prostate cancer requiring staging and specialist oncology review.
suggestedQuestions: Any bone scan or PET CT?
preliminaryOpinion.travelSuitability: Likely possible if staging confirms non-emergency status.
preliminaryOpinion.localTreatmentRecommendation: Continue local oncology care while records are completed.
preliminaryOpinion.emergencyRecommendation: Seek urgent local care if severe pain, urinary obstruction, or neurological symptoms occur.
preliminaryOpinion.correctionNotes: Do not send until pathology is uploaded.
preliminaryOpinion.patientFacingOpinion: A preliminary opinion can be prepared after pathology and staging documents are received.
preliminaryOpinion.disclaimer: This preliminary medical opinion is based only on the available documents. It is not a final diagnosis or treatment decision and does not replace evaluation by the relevant specialist or hospital medical team.

hospitalPackage.clinicalCaseSummary: Oncology package not ready for hospital submission.
hospitalPackage.caseBrief: Need more documents before hospital MSO request.
clinicalQuestions: Staging and treatment pathway after pathology review
hospitalPackage.notesToHospital: Do not submit until pathology is added.

clinicalProfile.patientSummary: Advanced oncology patient with limited expected benefit from expensive international travel.
clinicalProfile.caseSummary: Clinical lead recommends local urgent care and palliative discussion before any international plan.
clinicalProfile.diagnosis: Advanced cancer, likely low-benefit travel case.
clinicalProfile.medicalHistory: Prior oncology records show advanced disease and declining functional status.
clinicalProfile.comorbidities: Cachexia and poor functional status reported.
clinicalProfile.travelFitness: Commercial travel not recommended based on available information.

checklist.notes: Available but travel not advised now.

preliminaryOpinion.aiDraftSummary: AI draft flagged emergency risk and low expected benefit from travel. Clinical lead corrected tone and recommended local urgent care first.
preliminaryOpinion.possibleDiagnosis: Advanced cancer with limited benefit from travel.
preliminaryOpinion.travelSuitability: Commercial travel not recommended at this time.
preliminaryOpinion.localTreatmentRecommendation: Recommend urgent local care and palliative/supportive care discussion first.
preliminaryOpinion.emergencyRecommendation: Immediate local hospital evaluation if pain, dehydration, confusion, breathing difficulty, or inability to eat/drink worsens.
preliminaryOpinion.correctionNotes: Emphasized supportive care and avoided overpromising international benefit.
preliminaryOpinion.patientFacingOpinion: Based on the available documents and reported functional status, international travel may have low expected benefit and may create medical risk. We recommend urgent local care and a supportive care discussion before considering travel.
preliminaryOpinion.disclaimer: This preliminary medical opinion is based only on the available documents. It is not a final diagnosis or treatment decision and does not replace evaluation by the relevant specialist or hospital medical team.

hospitalPackage.medicalSummary: Hospital package not recommended until local stabilization.
hospitalPackage.clinicalCaseSummary: Low-benefit travel case; hospital submission paused.
clinicalQuestions: Would any hospital accept after stabilization?

auditTrail.reason: Low expected benefit and travel risk
